# define normalization function: remove diacritics, tatweel, punctuation, unify hamza etc.
import re, unicodedata

arabic_diacritics = re.compile(r'[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]')
tatweel = re.compile(r'[\u0640]')
punct = re.compile(r'[\u200f-\u206f\u2e00-\u2e7f\u060C\u061B\u061F\u066A-\u066D\.\,\:\;\!\?\-\—\(\)\[\]\{\}\"\'\«\»\“\”\‘\’،؛؟…٫٬ـ]')
spaces = re.compile(r'\s+')

def normalize_ar(s):
    if s is None:
        return ''
    s2 = s
    s2 = s2.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا')
    s2 = s2.replace('ى','ي').replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ة','ه')
    s2 = arabic_diacritics.sub('', s2)
    s2 = tatweel.sub('', s2)
    s2 = punct.sub(' ', s2)
    s2 = spaces.sub(' ', s2)
    s2 = s2.strip().lower()
    return s2

def contains_ar(s):
    return any('\u0600' <= ch <= '\u06FF' for ch in s)
